data.title: China Accuses US Of Cyber Espionage And Theft Of Business Secrets Amid Rising Tensions
data.description: Since August, an advanced material design research unit in China has reportedly been targeted by suspected American intelligence agencies.

data.title: Mesoblast's Cell Therapy Treatment For Graft Versus Host Disease Gets FDA Approval, Stock Surges
data.description: Mesoblast's Ryoncil is now FDA-approved for pediatric SR-aGvHD, marking a milestone in mesenchymal stromal cell therapies in the U.S.

data.title: Global Markets Slide On Fed's Hawkish Rate Policy; U.S. Dollar Eases Slightly After Hitting Two-Year High - Global Markets Today While US Slept
data.description: US markets close lower on Wed, Fed cuts rates by 0.25% but signals fewer cuts in 2025. S&P 500, Dow, and Nasdaq all down. Asia markets also down.

data.title: Why Is Penny Stock Canoo Falling On Thursday?
data.description: Canoo shares are falling after the company furloughed 82 employees and idled its Oklahoma factories while securing capital to address financial challenges.

data.title: Tesla EU Registrations Plunge 41% In November, Casting Shadow On Q4 Target Of Over 500,000 EV Deliveries
data.description: Tesla's new vehicle registrations in the EU are continuing to drop, threatening the company's global EV delivery target for the year.
